name: @design-system-toolkit/core
description: Framework-pure engine for design-system auditing: normalized token model, WCAG contrast, drift diff, and a browser code adapter.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js src/adapters/code.js src/adapters/cssStatic.js src/adapters/dtcg.js src/adapters/figmaVariables.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outdir=dist
